MAEVE VAMY

Fine Art

DISCOVERFollow me

Style

Oil

On Canvas

Oil painting doesn't apologize for its mess, or its refusal to be rushed. Every brushstroke carries weight, every layer tells a story, and every piece demands time to breathe.

Realism

Unrealistic

No filters, no hiding, no pretending. Realism strips away the comfortable lies and serves you truth so sharp you'll question what's real and what's canvas.

Surreal

Vibes

Color doesn't need permission. Form doesn't need explanation. Abstract art gives us what realism can't. Step into chaos that somehow makes perfect sense.

CHECK OUT MY WORK
Like what you see?

Reach out
